articles.title: Girl raped by boys spared jail tells BBC judge's decision was like 'rock in my face'
articles.description: Speaking to the BBC’s Laura Kuenssberg, the girl, who is now 16, said: "What was the point in putting me through that?"

articles.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
articles.description: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

articles.title: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

articles.title: Heatwave likely to be confirmed as record-breaking temperatures forecast
articles.description: The soaring temperatures could lead to new national May temperature records being set on bank holiday Monday.
